definition.title: Lulu Membership Report — Live Data Feed (Feb 2026)
definition.objective: Messaging guidance: emphasize community size, diverse carrier base, driver-first language, $13/day at full participation. Avoid rounding, don't claim all active, don't name carriers without permission.
definition.target_audience: Internal use — Anj Bot content accuracy. Numbers inform all audience-facing content.
definition.cadence: Living document. Numbers update with each Lulu export. Pricing and facts are locked.

campaign_card.target_audience: Internal use — Anj Bot content accuracy. Numbers inform all audience-facing content.
campaign_card.campaign_name: Lulu Membership Report — Live Data Feed (Feb 2026)
key_messages: 1,159 registered members across 883 unique carriers — grassroots movement
746 new members in February alone — 2.5x over January (hockey stick growth)
82% new registrants, only 6% completing profiles — massive activation opportunity

initiatives: Milestone posts. Growth graphics (hockey stick chart). Social proof content. Activation campaigns for profile completion. Pricing content.

_legacy_card.description: INTERNAL RESOURCE from Lulu. Verified, defensible membership data. 1,159 members across 883 carriers. 746 new in February (2.5x over January). 100% contact coverage. Hockey stick growth.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Messaging guidance: emphasize community size, diverse carrier base, driver-first language, $13/day at full participation. Avoid rounding, don't claim all active, don't name carriers without permission.

_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Social proof: 1,159 members and growing. 883 unique carriers. 746 new in February. Grassroots movement framing. Pricing (locked): Guest $59/day, Proprietary $13/day, Capital Participation 80% refundable.
